title: [DO NOT MERGE] test new c/image dependency
body: This PR adds the dependency github.com/coreos/pkg needed by https://github.com/containers/image/pull/546 to get the tests passed according to [the documentation](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/master/README.md#dependencies-management).

comments.body: ACK on the implementation (though I don’t really love the approach — but let’s discuss that in #546). Thanks!
